For Hong Kongers still in Hong Kong:

Allowing family members of Canadians to travel to Canada under exemptions to travel restrictions (still required to quarantine for 14 days upon entry)

A new open work permit, allowing Hong Kongers who have completed post-secondary education (college or university, whether in Canada or Hong Kong) to work in Canada for up to three years

A dedicated pathway to permanent residence status to be released in 2021. This pathway will require minimum language skills, minimum education levels, and one year of Canadian work experience.

Expediting study permit applications (for those who want to study in Canada), permanent residency applications, and family sponsorship applications

replies.msg:
加拿大國家職業分類系統 NOC 根據當地最需要的才能，將不同職業種類、技能水平、工作職責劃分成 5 個等級。

等級 工作類型 職業例子
0 管理工作 餐廳經理、物業管理、酒店管理
A 需要大學學位的專業職位 醫生、牙醫、建築師、機械工程師、電子工程師
B 需要專科文憑或曾接受相關職業培訓的技工 廚師、機電工
C 高中學歷或曾接受相關職業訓練 貨車司機、餐廳侍應
D 勞動力職位 清潔工、水果採摘工
只有職業屬 0、A 或 B 級，方可經由上述的 3 種計劃，申請移民加拿大。

C 級職業則只可嘗試「大西洋四省移民試點計劃」（Atlantic Immigration Pilot Program，AIPP），當中的核心條件為有四省內指定僱主（Designated Employer）提供至少一年的 Job Offer。

D 級職業暫時未有任何永久居住計劃，只可申請臨時工作許可證（Work Permit），到加拿大工作。

計埋C同D

你話呢
自己睇下加拿大D技術移民list參考下先

加拿大國家職業分類系統 NOC 根據當地最需要的才能，將不同職業種類、技能水平、工作職責劃分成 5 個等級。

等級 工作類型 職業例子
0 管理工作 餐廳經理、物業管理、酒店管理
A 需要大學學位的專業職位 醫生、牙醫、建築師、機械工程師、電子工程師
B 需要專科文憑或曾接受相關職業培訓的技工 廚師、機電工
C 高中學歷或曾接受相關職業訓練 貨車司機、餐廳侍應
D 勞動力職位 清潔工、水果採摘工
只有職業屬 0、A 或 B 級，方可經由上述的 3 種計劃，申請移民加拿大。

C 級職業則只可嘗試「大西洋四省移民試點計劃」（Atlantic Immigration Pilot Program，AIPP），當中的核心條件為有四省內指定僱主（Designated Employer）提供至少一年的 Job Offer。

D 級職業暫時未有任何永久居住計劃，只可申請臨時工作許可證（Work Permit），到加拿大工作。

計埋C同D
香港超過一半人口都走得

只有職業屬 0、A 或 B 級，方可經由上述的 3 種計劃，申請移民加拿大。

C 級職業則只可嘗試「大西洋四省移民試點計劃」（Atlantic Immigration Pilot Program，AIPP），當中的核心條件為有四省內指定僱主（Designated Employer）提供至少一年的 Job Offer。

D 級職業暫時未有任何永久居住計劃，只可申請臨時工作許可證（Work Permit），到加拿大工作。

計埋C同D

For those who come here to either study or work, 2 new pathways to permanent residence are being created, which will be available in 2021:
The first will target former Hong Kong residents who have gained a minimum of 1 year of authorized work experience in Canada and meet other criteria such as minimum language and education levels.
The second pathway will be for those who have graduated from a post-secondary institution in Canada. These individuals can then apply directly for permanent residence.

quote.msg: Film?

你話呢
自己睇下加拿大D技術移民list參考下先

加拿大國家職業分類系統 NOC 根據當地最需要的才能，將不同職業種類、技能水平、工作職責劃分成 5 個等級。

等級 工作類型 職業例子
0 管理工作 餐廳經理、物業管理、酒店管理
A 需要大學學位的專業職位 醫生、牙醫、建築師、機械工程師、電子工程師
B 需要專科文憑或曾接受相關職業培訓的技工 廚師、機電工
C 高中學歷或曾接受相關職業訓練 貨車司機、餐廳侍應
D 勞動力職位 清潔工、水果採摘工
只有職業屬 0、A 或 B 級，方可經由上述的 3 種計劃，申請移民加拿大。

C 級職業則只可嘗試「大西洋四省移民試點計劃」（Atlantic Immigration Pilot Program，AIPP），當中的核心條件為有四省內指定僱主（Designated Employer）提供至少一年的 Job Offer。

D 級職業暫時未有任何永久居住計劃，只可申請臨時工作許可證（Work Permit），到加拿大工作。

計埋C同D
香港超過一半人口都走得

quote.msg: Film?

你話呢
自己睇下加拿大D技術移民list參考下先

加拿大國家職業分類系統 NOC 根據當地最需要的才能，將不同職業種類、技能水平、工作職責劃分成 5 個等級。

等級 工作類型 職業例子
0 管理工作 餐廳經理、物業管理、酒店管理
A 需要大學學位的專業職位 醫生、牙醫、建築師、機械工程師、電子工程師
B 需要專科文憑或曾接受相關職業培訓的技工 廚師、機電工
C 高中學歷或曾接受相關職業訓練 貨車司機、餐廳侍應
D 勞動力職位 清潔工、水果採摘工
只有職業屬 0、A 或 B 級，方可經由上述的 3 種計劃，申請移民加拿大。

C 級職業則只可嘗試「大西洋四省移民試點計劃」（Atlantic Immigration Pilot Program，AIPP），當中的核心條件為有四省內指定僱主（Designated Employer）提供至少一年的 Job Offer。

D 級職業暫時未有任何永久居住計劃，只可申請臨時工作許可證（Work Permit），到加拿大工作。

計埋C同D

quote.msg:
你話呢
自己睇下加拿大D技術移民list參考下先

加拿大國家職業分類系統 NOC 根據當地最需要的才能，將不同職業種類、技能水平、工作職責劃分成 5 個等級。

等級 工作類型 職業例子
0 管理工作 餐廳經理、物業管理、酒店管理
A 需要大學學位的專業職位 醫生、牙醫、建築師、機械工程師、電子工程師
B 需要專科文憑或曾接受相關職業培訓的技工 廚師、機電工
C 高中學歷或曾接受相關職業訓練 貨車司機、餐廳侍應
D 勞動力職位 清潔工、水果採摘工
只有職業屬 0、A 或 B 級，方可經由上述的 3 種計劃，申請移民加拿大。

C 級職業則只可嘗試「大西洋四省移民試點計劃」（Atlantic Immigration Pilot Program，AIPP），當中的核心條件為有四省內指定僱主（Designated Employer）提供至少一年的 Job Offer。

D 級職業暫時未有任何永久居住計劃，只可申請臨時工作許可證（Work Permit），到加拿大工作。

計埋C同D

你話呢
自己睇下加拿大D技術移民list參考下先

加拿大國家職業分類系統 NOC 根據當地最需要的才能，將不同職業種類、技能水平、工作職責劃分成 5 個等級。

等級 工作類型 職業例子
0 管理工作 餐廳經理、物業管理、酒店管理
A 需要大學學位的專業職位 醫生、牙醫、建築師、機械工程師、電子工程師
B 需要專科文憑或曾接受相關職業培訓的技工 廚師、機電工
C 高中學歷或曾接受相關職業訓練 貨車司機、餐廳侍應
D 勞動力職位 清潔工、水果採摘工
只有職業屬 0、A 或 B 級，方可經由上述的 3 種計劃，申請移民加拿大。

C 級職業則只可嘗試「大西洋四省移民試點計劃」（Atlantic Immigration Pilot Program，AIPP），當中的核心條件為有四省內指定僱主（Designated Employer）提供至少一年的 Job Offer。

D 級職業暫時未有任何永久居住計劃，只可申請臨時工作許可證（Work Permit），到加拿大工作。

計埋C同D
香港超過一半人口都走得

quote.msg:
加拿大國家職業分類系統 NOC 根據當地最需要的才能，將不同職業種類、技能水平、工作職責劃分成 5 個等級。

等級 工作類型 職業例子
0 管理工作 餐廳經理、物業管理、酒店管理
A 需要大學學位的專業職位 醫生、牙醫、建築師、機械工程師、電子工程師
B 需要專科文憑或曾接受相關職業培訓的技工 廚師、機電工
C 高中學歷或曾接受相關職業訓練 貨車司機、餐廳侍應
D 勞動力職位 清潔工、水果採摘工
只有職業屬 0、A 或 B 級，方可經由上述的 3 種計劃，申請移民加拿大。

C 級職業則只可嘗試「大西洋四省移民試點計劃」（Atlantic Immigration Pilot Program，AIPP），當中的核心條件為有四省內指定僱主（Designated Employer）提供至少一年的 Job Offer。

D 級職業暫時未有任何永久居住計劃，只可申請臨時工作許可證（Work Permit），到加拿大工作。

計埋C同D

quote.msg: Film?

你話呢
自己睇下加拿大D技術移民list參考下先

加拿大國家職業分類系統 NOC 根據當地最需要的才能，將不同職業種類、技能水平、工作職責劃分成 5 個等級。

等級 工作類型 職業例子
0 管理工作 餐廳經理、物業管理、酒店管理
A 需要大學學位的專業職位 醫生、牙醫、建築師、機械工程師、電子工程師
B 需要專科文憑或曾接受相關職業培訓的技工 廚師、機電工
C 高中學歷或曾接受相關職業訓練 貨車司機、餐廳侍應
D 勞動力職位 清潔工、水果採摘工
只有職業屬 0、A 或 B 級，方可經由上述的 3 種計劃，申請移民加拿大。

C 級職業則只可嘗試「大西洋四省移民試點計劃」（Atlantic Immigration Pilot Program，AIPP），當中的核心條件為有四省內指定僱主（Designated Employer）提供至少一年的 Job Offer。

D 級職業暫時未有任何永久居住計劃，只可申請臨時工作許可證（Work Permit），到加拿大工作。

計埋C同D
香港超過一半人口都走得

加拿大國家職業分類系統 NOC 根據當地最需要的才能，將不同職業種類、技能水平、工作職責劃分成 5 個等級。

等級 工作類型 職業例子
0 管理工作 餐廳經理、物業管理、酒店管理
A 需要大學學位的專業職位 醫生、牙醫、建築師、機械工程師、電子工程師
B 需要專科文憑或曾接受相關職業培訓的技工 廚師、機電工
C 高中學歷或曾接受相關職業訓練 貨車司機、餐廳侍應
D 勞動力職位 清潔工、水果採摘工
只有職業屬 0、A 或 B 級，方可經由上述的 3 種計劃，申請移民加拿大。

C 級職業則只可嘗試「大西洋四省移民試點計劃」（Atlantic Immigration Pilot Program，AIPP），當中的核心條件為有四省內指定僱主（Designated Employer）提供至少一年的 Job Offer。

D 級職業暫時未有任何永久居住計劃，只可申請臨時工作許可證（Work Permit），到加拿大工作。

計埋C同D
香港超過一半人口都走得
連登仔成日笑嘅物業管理同酒店管理

quote.msg:
你話呢
自己睇下加拿大D技術移民list參考下先

加拿大國家職業分類系統 NOC 根據當地最需要的才能，將不同職業種類、技能水平、工作職責劃分成 5 個等級。

等級 工作類型 職業例子
0 管理工作 餐廳經理、物業管理、酒店管理
A 需要大學學位的專業職位 醫生、牙醫、建築師、機械工程師、電子工程師
B 需要專科文憑或曾接受相關職業培訓的技工 廚師、機電工
C 高中學歷或曾接受相關職業訓練 貨車司機、餐廳侍應
D 勞動力職位 清潔工、水果採摘工
只有職業屬 0、A 或 B 級，方可經由上述的 3 種計劃，申請移民加拿大。

C 級職業則只可嘗試「大西洋四省移民試點計劃」（Atlantic Immigration Pilot Program，AIPP），當中的核心條件為有四省內指定僱主（Designated Employer）提供至少一年的 Job Offer。

D 級職業暫時未有任何永久居住計劃，只可申請臨時工作許可證（Work Permit），到加拿大工作。

計埋C同D

你話呢
自己睇下加拿大D技術移民list參考下先

加拿大國家職業分類系統 NOC 根據當地最需要的才能，將不同職業種類、技能水平、工作職責劃分成 5 個等級。

等級 工作類型 職業例子
0 管理工作 餐廳經理、物業管理、酒店管理
A 需要大學學位的專業職位 醫生、牙醫、建築師、機械工程師、電子工程師
B 需要專科文憑或曾接受相關職業培訓的技工 廚師、機電工
C 高中學歷或曾接受相關職業訓練 貨車司機、餐廳侍應
D 勞動力職位 清潔工、水果採摘工
只有職業屬 0、A 或 B 級，方可經由上述的 3 種計劃，申請移民加拿大。

C 級職業則只可嘗試「大西洋四省移民試點計劃」（Atlantic Immigration Pilot Program，AIPP），當中的核心條件為有四省內指定僱主（Designated Employer）提供至少一年的 Job Offer。

D 級職業暫時未有任何永久居住計劃，只可申請臨時工作許可證（Work Permit），到加拿大工作。

計埋C同D
香港超過一半人口都走得

佢官網分咗兩點

1. 一個係話五年內畢業嘅無論係加拿大學校定海外學校都有資格申請三年work permit

2. 另外一點話係出新政策比喺加拿大住緊嘅人
-有一年工作經驗同埋符合其他少少語言要求 學歷要求就可以申請pr
-喺加拿大學校畢業嘅人可以直接申請pr

所以其實無仔細講幾年前加拿大學校畢業嗰啲人當唔當新政策可以直接申請Pr
但佢第一點同第二點其實係互相配合

你只要係5年內畢業申請到三年wp 你過嚟呢度返工做咗一年野就可以申請pr
再唔係嘅話直接讀多樣嘢喺呢度畢業都可以直接申請到pr
但讀d咩有d咩要求就未出
可能可以話兩年以上課程先認可

The new measures announced target young, educated Hong Kongers and were billed as part of the government’s plan to increase skilled immigration to fill jobs in key sectors including healthcare and technology.

The first avenue will see quick, open work permits issued for three years for Hong Kongers who have graduated from either a recognized Canadian or overseas post-secondary institution in the last five years. If approved, their spouse or partner as well as children can also apply to come with them.

The second avenue is the creation of two new pathways toward permanent residency.

One will be for Hong Kong residents living in Canada who have graduated within the last three years from a “recognized Canadian learning institution” and have completed at last of their courses in Canada.

The other permanent residency stream will target Hong Kong residents in Canada who graduated from either a “recognized Canadian learning institution” or an overseas post-graduate program, and have spent one year working in Canada in the last five years.

The final avenue announced makes two procedural changes to existing asylum laws.

One waives the one-year waiting period for a failed asylum applicant from Hong Kong to apply for another assessment of their claim.

The other makes it clear no charges laid under the national security law or against pro-democracy protestors in massive protests against the Chinese regime dating back to last summer will be considered legitimate grounds for disqualifying applicants without other charges that are recognized in Canada.


source: Globalnews Canada

呢個講得清楚啲。



Thank you Canada!

The first avenue will see quick, open work permits issued for three years for Hong Kongers who have graduated from either a recognized Canadian or overseas post-secondary institution in the last five years. If approved, their spouse or partner as well as children can also apply to come with them.

The second avenue is the creation of two new pathways toward permanent residency.

One will be for Hong Kong residents living in Canada who have graduated within the last three years from a “recognized Canadian learning institution” and have completed at last of their courses in Canada.

The other permanent residency stream will target Hong Kong residents in Canada who graduated from either a “recognized Canadian learning institution” or an overseas post-graduate program, and have spent one year working in Canada in the last five years.

The final avenue announced makes two procedural changes to existing asylum laws.

One waives the one-year waiting period for a failed asylum applicant from Hong Kong to apply for another assessment of their claim.

The other makes it clear no charges laid under the national security law or against pro-democracy protestors in massive protests against the Chinese regime dating back to last summer will be considered legitimate grounds for disqualifying applicants without other charges that are recognized in Canada.


source: Globalnews Canada

quote.msg:
The new measures announced target young, educated Hong Kongers and were billed as part of the government’s plan to increase skilled immigration to fill jobs in key sectors including healthcare and technology.

The first avenue will see quick, open work permits issued for three years for Hong Kongers who have graduated from either a recognized Canadian or overseas post-secondary institution in the last five years. If approved, their spouse or partner as well as children can also apply to come with them.

The second avenue is the creation of two new pathways toward permanent residency.

One will be for Hong Kong residents living in Canada who have graduated within the last three years from a “recognized Canadian learning institution” and have completed at last of their courses in Canada.

The other permanent residency stream will target Hong Kong residents in Canada who graduated from either a “recognized Canadian learning institution” or an overseas post-graduate program, and have spent one year working in Canada in the last five years.

The final avenue announced makes two procedural changes to existing asylum laws.

One waives the one-year waiting period for a failed asylum applicant from Hong Kong to apply for another assessment of their claim.

The other makes it clear no charges laid under the national security law or against pro-democracy protestors in massive protests against the Chinese regime dating back to last summer will be considered legitimate grounds for disqualifying applicants without other charges that are recognized in Canada.


source: Globalnews Canada

呢個講得清楚啲。



Thank you Canada!

I have a PhD and am in a post-doctoral program. Do I qualify for the Canadian Experience Class?

Work experience gained while you were on a study permit will not count towards meeting the Canadian Experience Class requirements.

But, you may still be eligible if you:

already gained one year of skilled Canadian work experience while you were not on a study permit, and
meet the language threshold for that occupation .

quote.msg:
The new measures announced target young, educated Hong Kongers and were billed as part of the government’s plan to increase skilled immigration to fill jobs in key sectors including healthcare and technology.

The first avenue will see quick, open work permits issued for three years for Hong Kongers who have graduated from either a recognized Canadian or overseas post-secondary institution in the last five years. If approved, their spouse or partner as well as children can also apply to come with them.

The second avenue is the creation of two new pathways toward permanent residency.

One will be for Hong Kong residents living in Canada who have graduated within the last three years from a “recognized Canadian learning institution” and have completed at last of their courses in Canada.

The other permanent residency stream will target Hong Kong residents in Canada who graduated from either a “recognized Canadian learning institution” or an overseas post-graduate program, and have spent one year working in Canada in the last five years.

The final avenue announced makes two procedural changes to existing asylum laws.

One waives the one-year waiting period for a failed asylum applicant from Hong Kong to apply for another assessment of their claim.

The other makes it clear no charges laid under the national security law or against pro-democracy protestors in massive protests against the Chinese regime dating back to last summer will be considered legitimate grounds for disqualifying applicants without other charges that are recognized in Canada.


source: Globalnews Canada

quote.msg:
The new measures announced target young, educated Hong Kongers and were billed as part of the government’s plan to increase skilled immigration to fill jobs in key sectors including healthcare and technology.

The first avenue will see quick, open work permits issued for three years for Hong Kongers who have graduated from either a recognized Canadian or overseas post-secondary institution in the last five years. If approved, their spouse or partner as well as children can also apply to come with them.

The second avenue is the creation of two new pathways toward permanent residency.

One will be for Hong Kong residents living in Canada who have graduated within the last three years from a “recognized Canadian learning institution” and have completed at last of their courses in Canada.

The other permanent residency stream will target Hong Kong residents in Canada who graduated from either a “recognized Canadian learning institution” or an overseas post-graduate program, and have spent one year working in Canada in the last five years.

The final avenue announced makes two procedural changes to existing asylum laws.

One waives the one-year waiting period for a failed asylum applicant from Hong Kong to apply for another assessment of their claim.

The other makes it clear no charges laid under the national security law or against pro-democracy protestors in massive protests against the Chinese regime dating back to last summer will be considered legitimate grounds for disqualifying applicants without other charges that are recognized in Canada.


source: Globalnews Canada

Honestly speaking, I could write easily on papers by repeating what I would usually say in proper English. Try to speak more in English and write it in a logical way. I did not use any writing platform due to the fact that they are not really helpful at some points. On another way round, you should watch more YouTube videos filmed by American or Canadian. This is because you may get in touch with those people more frequently in the future. Last but not least, "Practice Makes Perfect". In order to practice the American accent, try to repeat the lines that the streamer or video bloggers have said. Hope this would help you!
（利申：早幾年用3個月時間不停煲Logan Paul啲片，過到去溫哥華島讀一年書。Grade 11兩個sem已經完成ESL，English 10，English 11。重點其實係聽多的先至有機會知道的文法點樣運用，記得要多講英文，唔好怕人哋聽唔明。可以試下上堂都幫大陸人翻譯，連老師都會加印象分比你！希望以上可以幫到你）
